backend/main.mo: Main Internet Computer actor defining all core types (UserProfile, Trip, PricingConfig, etc.) and backend logic for a ride-hailing app with customer, driver, and admin roles, including access control and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state to the new shape by resetting the admin principal set to two hardcoded principals.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing component responsibilities and recent fixes across the app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, renders the AppShell with navigation and conditional ProfileSetupModal, and wraps everything in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin UI tab displaying a searchable, paginated table of all trips with status badges, formatted locations, timestamps, and fares fetched via useGetAllTrips.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Admin UI tab showing a searchable table of all registered users with their name, email, role badge, and join date fetched via useGetAllUsers.
frontend/src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Wraps protected routes and waits up to 5 seconds for Internet Identity to resolve, showing a loading spinner; redirects unauthenticated users to /login.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Displays a scrollable list of pending, unassigned trips for on-duty drivers, with an accept button for each trip; shows off-duty or empty-state messages as appropriate.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Renders a scrollable list of a customer's trips with status badges, pickup/dropoff locations, vehicle type, fare, and timestamps; shows skeletons while loading and an empty state when there are no trips.
frontend/src/components/DataLoadErrorBan: Displays a dismissible error banner with a refresh button when data fails to load.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Shows a driver's profile card including duty status, service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, and languages, with an edit button to open the edit form.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Fetches and displays a driver's trips filtered by their principal, with a 'Complete Trip' button for accepted trips and fare/status details per card.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: Form for editing a driver's profile fields (service area, vehicle experience, transmission comfort, availability, languages) that submits via the upsertDriverProfile mutation and shows toast feedback.
A modal dialog that wraps EditDriverProfileForm, normalizing the driver profile before passing it to the form for editing service area, vehicle experience, and availability.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: A React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with Retry and Reset App options.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A page layout wrapper that includes the Navigation header, a main content area, and a footer with a copyright notice and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: A sticky top navigation bar showing the app logo, backend health status (dev only), user role badge, dashboard link, and a logout button based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/OfflineBanner.ts: A dismissible sticky banner that alerts users when the backend is unreachable, displaying a WifiOff icon and a close button.
frontend/src/components/PricingTab.tsx: An admin-only tab component for viewing and editing pricing configuration (local, outstation, vehicle multipliers, commissions) with form state synced from the backend and saved via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal form for new users to enter their full name and email, submitting via the backend actor's setProfile method and invalidating the profile query on success.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A lightweight route guard that redirects unauthenticated users to /login and renders children only when authenticated.
A form component for customers to create trip requests, handling trip type, journey type, vehicle selection, and location input, then converting the backend trip response to the local Trip type.
frontend/src/components/RoleGuard.tsx: A route guard component that checks authentication and user role, redirecting unauthenticated users to /login, showing a spinner while loading, and either rendering children, a NotAuthorizedPage, or redirecting to /select-role based on role match.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: A modal dialog that lets a new user choose between Customer or Driver roles, calling the appropriate mutation and navigating to the corresponding dashboard on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendHealth.ts: A hook that pings the backend actor to check reachability, returning isHealthy, isChecking, and error states with a 30-second stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A React Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated user's profile from the backend actor, exposing loading and fetched states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage ICP AuthClient lifecycle, exposing the user's identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central collection of React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile, role fetching/setting, pricing config, trips, and driver profiles, all with timeout wrappers and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for a light/dark earth-tone color theme including primary greens, accent ambers, and chart colors.
frontend/src/lib/defaultConfig.ts: Exports a DEFAULT_CONFIG constant with fallback pricing configuration values for local and outstation trips, vehicle multipliers, and commission rates.
frontend/src/lib/types.ts: Defines all frontend domain types (AppRole, Trip, UserProfile, etc.) and exports a `getRoleString` utility that safely normalizes Candid role variants from multiple backend formats into a plain string.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying identity info, user/trip stats, and tabbed management sections for users, trips, and pricing using data from backend query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUpgradePage.tsx: Page with a form that allows a user to enter a setup code to upgrade their account to the admin role, navigating to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard showing a ride request form and a trip list with optimistic updates, merging locally created trips with backend-fetched trips.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard displaying the driver's profile, an edit profile modal, and tabbed sections for available trips and the driver's own trips.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Root route component that acts as a pure router, redirecting authenticated users to the appropriate dashboard based on their role or to login/onboarding pages if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that triggers Internet Identity authentication and redirects already-authenticated users to the post-login route.
frontend/src/pages/NotAuthorizedPage.tsx: Displays a 403-style 'Not Authorized' page with a shield icon and a button to navigate back to the home route.
Post-login redirect page that fetches the user's role and navigates them to the appropriate dashboard (admin, driver, customer) or to role selection if no role is assigned.
frontend/src/pages/SelectRolePage.tsx: Allows a newly authenticated user to select either a customer or driver role, then redirects to the corresponding dashboard; also handles logout and error/loading states.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeProfile.ts: Provides utility functions to normalize Candid variant array fields (vehicleExperience, transmissionComfort, languages) in a UserProfile into plain string arrays.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeRole.ts: Normalizes backend role values (plain strings, Candid variant objects, or legacy '#'-prefixed keys) into a consistent lowercase role string.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/withTimeout.ts: Wraps a promise with a configurable timeout, rejecting with a TimeoutError if the timeout expires before the promise resolves.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, fonts, animations, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a ride-sharing app with pending backend tasks to seed a stable admin principals set and update isAdmin()/getMyRole() in the Motoko backend.
